# EdOne Group — AI-readable site map
# https://edonegroup.com/llms.txt

## About
EdOne Group is a UK-based education consultancy that helps students from 40+ countries secure university offers in the UK, Australia, Canada, USA, and Ireland. We specialise in UK postgraduate admissions, including second Master's degrees and research programmes that allow dependants.

## Key pages

### Home
- URL: https://edonegroup.com/
- Description: Overview of services, destinations, latest scholarship opportunities, and Gulf student support.

### Apply
- URL: https://edonegroup.com/apply
- Description: Application form for students wishing to start their university journey. Free — no hidden fees.

### Book a Free Consultation
- URL: https://edonegroup.com/book
- Description: Schedule a free 1-to-1 counselling session with an EdOne adviser.

### About EdOne Group
- URL: https://edonegroup.com/about
- Description: Our story, mission, team, and ethos as an education consultancy.

### Contact
- URL: https://edonegroup.com/contact
- Description: WhatsApp, email, and phone contact options. FAQs about the admissions process.

## Services
- /services — full overview of all services
- /services/uk-2nd-masters — Second Master's degree route in the UK (for students who already hold an MSc/MA)
- /services/uk-research-dependants — Research-track postgraduate programmes that permit dependants (spouse + children)

## Study Destinations
- /study-in/uk — Study in the United Kingdom: universities, entry requirements, funding, and student route visa overview
- /study-in/australia — Study in Australia: universities, PSW visa, IELTS requirements
- /study-in/canada — Study in Canada: universities, PGWP, SPP stream
- /study-in/usa — Study in the United States: universities, F-1 visa, GRE/GMAT
- /study-in/ireland — Study in Ireland: universities, Stay Back visa, EU-benchmark fees

## Gulf Students (bilingual EN/AR pages)
- /gulf/saudi-arabia — KASP, Aramco, and Chevening scholarships; UK universities for Saudi students
- /gulf/uae — Ministry of Education UAE, ADEK, and Chevening scholarships
- /gulf/qatar — Qatar Foundation, MOHESR, Chevening
- /gulf/kuwait — Kuwait Cultural Office (KCO) scholarship; KPC; Chevening
- /gulf/oman — Ministry of Higher Education Oman, PDO, Chevening

## Legal
- /legal/privacy — Privacy Policy (UK GDPR compliant)
- /legal/terms — Terms of Service
- /legal/cookies — Cookie Policy
- /legal/refund — Refund Policy

## Contact
- Email: hello@edonegroup.com
- WhatsApp: https://wa.me/447000000000
